title: [CombToSMT][DialectConversion] When rollback is removed, HWModuleOpConversion becomes illegal.
body:
See the discussion here: https://discourse.llvm.org/t/rfc-a-new-one-shot-dialect-conversion-driver/79083/46

I followed the steps to set the flag in MLIR to disallow rollback, and CombToSMT fails.

```
/scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir --convert-comb-to-smt | /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir # RUN: at lin\
e 1
+ /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir --convert-comb-to-smt
+ /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir
/scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir:122:1: error: pattern '(anonymous namespace)::HWModuleOpConversion' produced IR that could not be legalized
hw.module @decomposedShl(in %in1 : i2, in %in2 : i2, out out : i2) {
^
/scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir:122:1: note: see current operation: 
"hw.module"() <{module_type = !hw.modty<input in1 : i2, input in2 : i2, output out : i2>, parameters = [], result_locs = [loc("/scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir":122:58)], sym_name = "decomposedShl"}> ({
}) : () -> ()
LLVM ERROR: pattern '(anonymous namespace)::HWModuleOpConversion' rollback of IR modifications requested
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/test/Conversion/CombToSMT/comb-to-smt.mlir --convert-comb-to-smt
 #0 0x0000000001efe17d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:804:11
 #1 0x0000000001efe6fb PrintStackTraceSignalHandler(void*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:888:1
 #2 0x0000000001efc696 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:105:5
 #3 0x0000000001efef3d SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:418:7
 #4 0x00007f13d384dcf0 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x12cf0)

 #6 0x00007f13d221eea5 abort (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x21ea5)

#10 0x00000000063b64fb (anonymous namespace)::OperationLegalizer::legalizeWithPattern(mlir::Operation*, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&)::$_22::operator()(mlir::Pattern const&) const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/DialectConversion.cpp:0:20
#11 0x00000000063b62dd llvm::LogicalResult llvm::function_ref<llvm::LogicalResult (mlir::Pattern const&)>::callback_fn<(anonymous namespace)::OperationLegalizer::legalizeWithPattern(mlir::Operation*, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&)::$_22>(long, mlir::Pattern const&) /s\
cratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:46:12
#12 0x0000000006452b89 llvm::function_ref<llvm::LogicalResult (mlir::Pattern const&)>::operator()(mlir::Pattern const&) const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:69:12
#13 0x00000000064494a5 mlir::PatternApplicator::matchAndRewrite(mlir::Operation*, mlir::PatternRewriter&, llvm::function_ref<bool (mlir::Pattern const&)>, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Pattern const&)>, llvm::function_ref<llvm::LogicalResult (mlir::Pattern const&)>)::$_\

#20 0x00000000063a9483 mlir::OperationConverter::convert(mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&, mlir::Operation*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/DialectConversion.cpp:2596:26
#21 0x00000000063a9e2f mlir::OperationConverter::convertOperations(llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Operation*>) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/DialectConversion.cpp:2696:16
#22 0x00000000063adb29 mlir::applyPartialConversion(llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Operation*>, mlir::ConversionTarget const&, mlir::FrozenRewritePatternSet const&, mlir::ConversionConfig) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/DialectConversion.cpp:3388:22
#23 0x00000000063adc2d mlir::applyPartialConversion(mlir::Operation*, mlir::ConversionTarget const&, mlir::FrozenRewritePatternSet const&, mlir::ConversionConfig) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/DialectConversion.cpp:3394:10
#24 0x00000000043895c8 (anonymous namespace)::ConvertCombToSMTPass::runOnOperation() /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Conversion/CombToSMT/CombToSMT.cpp:299:14
#25 0x00000000066fabeb mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int)::$_7::operator()() const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:0:17
#26 0x00000000066fab85 void llvm::function_ref<void ()>::callback_fn<mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int)::$_7>(long) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:46:\
5
#27 0x0000000001e3f569 llvm::function_ref<void ()>::operator()() const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:69:5
#28 0x00000000066feb9d void mlir::MLIRContext::executeAction<mlir::PassExecutionAction, mlir::Pass&>(llvm::function_ref<void ()>, llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::IRUnit>, mlir::Pass&) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/MLIRContext.h:281:3
#29 0x00000000066f62aa mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:534:17
#30 0x00000000066f6864 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(mlir::OpPassManager&, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/\
Pass/Pass.cpp:594:16
#31 0x00000000066f834c mlir::PassManager::runPasses(mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:907:10
#32 0x00000000066f826f mlir::PassManager::run(mlir::Operation*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:887:60
...
```

@maerhart can you please take a look at this one? It seems like something we are relying on the DialectConversion framework to materialize isn't happening in one of the type conversions, and then we return failure after some other type conversion succeeds. I guess in this case the solution might be to make sure the materialization happens.
